info.title: devrating
info.description: Dev Rating is a command-line tool that suggests the minimal Pull Request size

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Dev Rating suggests the optimal Pull Request size for each contributor so that the PRs will have the same impact to the codebase.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update the rating by analyzing first-parent commits of the last 90 days

commands.name: update-by-one
commands.description: Update the rating by analyzing a merge commit

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Deserialize commit metadata and update the rating

commands.name: top
commands.description: Print the rating of active contributors for the last 90 days
